notes: Tai v1.0.1 adds two modules over v1.0.0: tai::publisher (claims the Publisher cap via OTW at publish time) and tai::agent_display (registers Display<OwnerCap<T>> per agent so wallets render the OwnerCap as a rich NFT-style card).

v1.0.1 was a fresh republish (NOT a Sui package upgrade) because OTW-init in newly-added modules is not yet supported by upgrade-time module additions on the protocol the v1.0.0 package was deployed at. The v1.0.0 package at 0x7d41…4f8d remains on-chain as a historical artifact but is no longer the canonical deployment.
